Hey, how do the biggest, nastiest polluters keep getting away with it?

**They buy themselves a free pass.**

It's the dirty truth: The world's worst polluters are using dark money to undermine environmental regulations and sabotage green energy initiatives. We breathe their smog, and they line their pockets.

[**We NEED to fix this broken system, or our families will pay a devastating price. Please, tell Congress to end polluter money in our elections >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/7208841468029435904/-3810019995988000768)
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/7208841468029435904/-3810019995988000768)
---

This issue strikes close to home: **Pennsylvania is home to SEVEN of the top 25 most polluted cities in the country** -- that means that millions of friends, family, and neighbors are subjected to devastating health risks.

Katie is a climate champion, there's no doubt about it. She spent her career fighting to defend the environment and create clean energy jobs. Katie knows what it takes to protect the clean air and water that keep our families healthy.

[**Join Katie in calling on Congress to overturn _Citizens United_ and eliminate pollution money from our of our politics. Add your name >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/7208841468029435904/-3810019995988000768)

| | Peter,
Today is the final day of the 2016 Defending the American Dream Summit, and we have an incredible lineup of speakers this afternoon.
If you couldn't make it here to Orlando for Summit, you can still watch the event live on our website [defendingthedream.com](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=75e7a49a2ad3ce7e3096b5731dd760db138b1ed6f7c6e0d805fdce8eb707cd49fb59cc6603b6283a05b08e15f9357742 "defendingthedream.com") starting at 2:00 PM EST.
Today's event features Governor Scott Walker, Senator Marco Rubio, Carly Fiorina, as well as British Conservative Politician and BREXIT Champion, Daniel Hannan. [You won't want to miss this.](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=75e7a49a2ad3ce7e5090f10bb80c0e79c7324fc0a6c267885bd6641afd27676ffad64fd096fe1e0b985ce0e498e30393 "You won't want to miss this.")
All around us a battle of ideas rages, and the very fabric of American prosperity is under attack. Now more than ever, Americans must unite in the defense of freedom and liberty.
Make sure to visit [defendingthedream.com](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=75e7a49a2ad3ce7e3096b5731dd760db138b1ed6f7c6e0d805fdce8eb707cd49fb59cc6603b6283a05b08e15f9357742 "defendingthedream.com") from 2:00- 5:00 PM EST to hear from our amazing lineup of free-market champions closing out the day at the 2016 Defending the American Dream Summit.
Thank you, Tim PhillipsPresident, Americans For Prosperity

body:
I am Donald Trump’s campaign manager. |

Peter, I am proud to serve as Mr. Trump’s campaign manager. Yesterday I asked him to give me a list of our strongest supporters. Your name showed up on the list as a Big League Supporter. Which is why I’m asking for your valuable input on the state of the race and the issues you care about. Please complete the Platform for America Survey today. You’ve probably received a few surveys from us over the past month already. These surveys play a crucial role in helping us shape our message and ensuring we’re on track to WIN. But we still have a lot to do, and little time to do it. We have LESS than 70 days to: Broaden our support and win over the hearts of undecided voters Fight back against Hillary’s slanderous attacks with ads of our own Execute a massive, nationwide grassroots ground game Your honest, critical feedback helps us keep our campaign on message -- and ensures it’s resonating with the American people. Take the Survey Now >> I don’t have to tell you -- the mainstream media is always going to try to distort our message. But my job is to help cut through the media’s noise and get our message straight to the voter. To successfully do that, I need your help. I need to know where you stand on a variety of issues facing our country. Between now and November 8, every single day counts. Please make it your priority to complete the Platform for America Survey. Thank you, Peter. I look forward to reading your responses, Kellyanne Conway Campaign Manager Donald Trump for President TAKE SURVEY NOW

How we lose the battleground states: | Derek --

Yesterday, the Republican National Committee announced that they’re putting 392 new organizers on the ground in key battleground states, including Florida, Ohio, and nine more.

With this wave of hiring, they now have more staff on the ground than they did at any point during 2012.

One of the reasons we’ve enjoyed a lead over Donald Trump in key states is that our ground game has far outpaced his.

But now that the RNC is sending in the cavalry, they could close that gap quickly.

With just a few weeks left until voter registration ends in states like Ohio and early voting begins in places like Iowa, we need to work even harder to make sure they don’t catch us.

**That means we’re counting on even more support from online donors. body:
Can I put you down for one? | Derek --

If there’s one person on the planet I trust when it comes to stickers, it’s my two-year-old daughter, Maverick. Every time we design a new one here at headquarters, I bring home a few for her. She loves to give them out to anyone who will take one -- if she gets the chance, she'll even stick it on their faces, too!

And she's a huge fan of this brand-new Hillary sticker:
[](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjY0MTYxMTgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODgwNTA3NTg0S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Isn’t it great? Maverick has already claimed a few for herself, and I’d love to order one for you, too.

We're going to get these stickers off to the printer bright and early on Monday morning, Derek. **[If you want to show off your support for Hillary, chip in $1 right now before the end of the weekend, and we’ll make sure you get one.](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjY0MTYxMTgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODgwNTA3NTg0S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

On my computer monitor at work, I of course have some Hillary stickers front and center. But I also have some ones from Maverick’s personal collection. (Monsters Inc. and Curious George are current favorites.)

And when I look at them, I think of her and remember why I get up early every day and do this job -- to make sure that she grows up in a country where all of her dreams can come true. That’s what this election is about for me.

Election Day is in 66 days, Derek, and you shouldn’t be without every bit of style -- and substance -- to let your family and friends know that you’re with Hillary. **So don’t wait to get your free sticker when you chip in whatever you can today. This order’s going to the printer soon:** [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjY0MTYxMTgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODgwNTA3NTg0S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thanks,

Tom

Tom Phillips
Director of Merchandising
Hillary for America

|
**Hillary needs you now more than ever -- chip in $1 and grab your free sticker today:**

| [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjY0MTYxMTgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODgwNTA3NTg0S0&mt=1&rt=0)

This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=MjY0MTYxMTgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODgwNTA3NTg0S0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! If you'd like more information on key policies, visit [hillaryclinton.com/issues](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjY0MTYxMTgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODgwNTA3NTg0S0&mt=1&rt=0). Opening this email on your iPhone? [Click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjY0MTYxMTgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODgwNTA3NTg0S0&mt=1&rt=0) to get our Hillary 2016 mobile app now. Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjY0MTYxMTgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODgwNTA3NTg0S0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjY0MTYxMTgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODgwNTA3NTg0S0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjY0MTYxMTgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODgwNTA3NTg0S0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjY0MTYxMTgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODgwNTA3NTg0S0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjY0MTYxMTgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODgwNTA3NTg0S0&mt=1&rt=0). Puedes encontrar más información sobre la campaña de Hillary en español [aquí](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjY0MTYxMTgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODgwNTA3NTg0S0&mt=1&rt=0). If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Yee-haw for you](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjY0MTYxMTgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODgwNTA3NTg0S0&mt=1&rt=0)! Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
